problem_text_cn: 如图2-练22(a)所示，一平面内有两直线 $AB$ 和 $CD$，相交角 $\varphi$。若直线 $AB$ 以速度 $v_1$ 在平面内沿垂直于 $AB$ 的方向移动，而直线 $CD$ 以速度 $v_2$ 在平面内沿垂直于 $CD$ 的方向移动。求两线交点 $P$ 的速度 $v_P$。
problem_text_en: As shown in Figure 2-22(a), two straight lines $AB$ and $CD$ intersect at an angle $\varphi$ in a plane. Line $AB$ moves at speed $v_1$ perpendicular to its own direction, and line $CD$ moves at speed $v_2$ perpendicular to its own direction. Find the velocity $v_P$ of their intersection point $P$.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】此题解法很多，这里利用位移方法求解，此法较为直观。

设某一时刻 $t_0$ 两直线交点在 $P$，经过 $\Delta t$ 时间间隔，$AB$ 移动 $v_1\Delta t$ 间距达 $A'B'$，$CD$ 移动 $v_2\Delta t$ 间距达 $C'D'$。如图2-练22(b)所示，显然
$$
PP_1 = \frac{v_1\Delta t}{\sin\varphi}, \quad P_1P_2 = \frac{v_2\Delta t}{\sin\varphi}
$$
而且 $P$ 点在相同时间内移至 $P_2$，因此
$$
PP_2 = v_P\Delta t
$$

利用 $\triangle PP_1P_2$ 的余弦定理得
$$
\overline{PP_2}^2 = \overline{PP_1}^2 + \overline{P_1P_2}^2 - 2 \overline{PP_1} \cdot \overline{P_1P_2} \cos\varphi
$$
即
$$
v_P^2 = \left(\frac{v_1}{\sin\varphi}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{v_2}{\sin\varphi}\right)^2 - 2 \frac{v_1 v_2}{\sin^2\varphi} \cos\varphi
$$
最后得 $P$ 点的速度为
$$
v_P = \frac{1}{\sin\varphi} \sqrt{v_1^2 + v_2^2 - 2v_1 v_2 \cos\varphi}
$$
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】This problem can be solved in many ways; here we use a displacement-based method, which is intuitive.

At time $t_0$, the lines intersect at $P$. After a time interval $\Delta t$, line $AB$ moves a distance $v_1\Delta t$ to $A'B'$, and line $CD$ moves a distance $v_2\Delta t$ to $C'D'$, as shown in Figure 2-22(b). Clearly:
$$
PP_1 = \frac{v_1\Delta t}{\sin\varphi}, \quad P_1P_2 = \frac{v_2\Delta t}{\sin\varphi}
$$
Point $P$ moves to $P_2$ in the same time, so:
$$
PP_2 = v_P\Delta t
$$

Applying the law of cosines to $\triangle PP_1P_2$:
$$
\overline{PP_2}^2 = \overline{PP_1}^2 + \overline{P_1P_2}^2 - 2 \overline{PP_1} \cdot \overline{P_1P_2} \cos\varphi
$$
Substituting the expressions for $PP_1$, $P_1P_2$, and $PP_2$:
$$
v_P^2 = \left(\frac{v_1}{\sin\varphi}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{v_2}{\sin\varphi}\right)^2 - 2 \frac{v_1 v_2}{\sin^2\varphi} \cos\varphi
$$
Simplifying gives the velocity of point $P$:
$$
v_P = \frac{1}{\sin\varphi} \sqrt{v_1^2 + v_2^2 - 2v_1 v_2 \cos\varphi}
$$

短时间内两直线的位移与交点位移分析图（图2-练22(b)）。
img_en:
Schematic of intersecting lines and their directions of motion (Figure 2-22(a)).

Displacement analysis of the lines and their intersection point over a short time (Figure 2-22(b)).
problem_answer: 两线交点 $P$ 的速度为 $v_P = \dfrac{1}{\sin\varphi} \sqrt{v_1^2 + v_2^2 - 2v_1 v_2 \cos\varphi}$。
